name: StandardScaler

name: OneHotEncoder
summary: Encode categorical columns into model-ready binary indicators with safe unseen-category handling.
description: Convert categorical features into numeric indicator columns for scikit-learn models while controlling behavior for unseen labels.
overview: OneHotEncoder converts each category into binary columns for model training. Use it as the default categorical encoding in sklearn pipelines, especially when categories may appear at inference that were not in training. Prefer handle_unknown="ignore" for production scoring. Compared with pandas.get_dummies, OneHotEncoder is better for train/serve parity because it stores fitted category mappings and integrates with ColumnTransformer/Pipeline. Key parameters: handle_unknown, sparse_output. Returns encoded matrix of shape (n_samples, encoded_features).
applications: Primary application: transform nominal categorical columns into numeric features for modeling.
Workflow application: place OneHotEncoder inside ColumnTransformer + Pipeline for CV-safe preprocessing.
Delivery application: avoid category mismatch errors in production by using handle_unknown="ignore".
